name: Allegretto al Forno
blurb: Michelin-starred Francie's casual sibling: wood-fired Neapolitan pies, Williamsburg.

name: Dishoom
blurb: London's cult Bombay café finally lands in NoMad — black dal incoming.

name: Oriana
blurb: Noortwyck vets burn everything beautifully: live-fire feasts, 7,000-bottle cellar, Nolita.

name: Rosina
blurb: Trinity's Adam Byatt goes full Italian for his most personal restaurant yet, Wandsworth Common.

name: Roost
blurb: Algerian-spiced 24-hour brined rotisserie chicken in Forest Gate's railway arches — very local, very cool.

name: Langosteria
blurb: Milan's fashion-world seafood haunt finally opens its long-delayed London debut at The OWO.
